configurations.name: torny-staging
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && set -a && source .env.staging.local && set +a && exec npm run dev

configurations.name: torny-staging-prod
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && set -a && source .env.staging.local && set +a && exec npx next start -p 3000
